themes.label: Creation
themes.summary: This chapter underscores creation, the heavens and earth, or God’s creative ordering work. Local Strong’s word study and cross references data reinforce this reading across 3 verses. Commentary leans on "Augustine of Hippo on SERMON 313A.2: So this heaven and earth is called the world. In saying...". Word-study detail reinforces "וָאָֽרֶץ׃: and earth - the earth (at large, or partitively a land)".

evidenceTrail.detail: הַמַּ֣יִם: the waters - water; figuratively, juice; by euphemism, urine, semen

evidenceTrail.label: Verse 5 word study
evidenceTrail.detail: הַ֝מַּ֗יִם: waters - water; figuratively, juice; by euphemism, urine, semen

themes.label: Judgment
themes.summary: This chapter addresses wrath, judgment, condemnation, justice, or divine reckoning. Local Strong’s word study and cross references data reinforce this reading across 1 verse. Commentary leans on "The imagined catastrophe is described: 'Then they had swallowed us up quick, when their wrath...". Word-study detail reinforces "אַפָּ֣ם: when their wrath - properly, the nose or nostril; hence, the face, and occasionally...".
